vocab.example: I am particularly keen on trekking through the unspoilt wilderness of the Scottish Highlands to reconnect with nature.

vocab.meaning: một chuyến đi dạo thong dong
vocab.example: If given the opportunity, I would love a leisurely stroll along the banks of the Seine as the sun begins to set.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề, hiểm trở
vocab.example: Walking along a rugged coastline offers a unique sense of freedom and a much-needed breath of salty sea air.
I would choose a mountain trail that promises panoramic views of the valley below to reward my physical exertion.

vocab.meaning: ánh nắng lốm đốm (xuyên qua kẽ lá)
vocab.example: There is nothing more enchanting than walking through an ancient forest bathed in dappled sunlight.

vocab.meaning: đại lộ/đường phố nhộn nhịp, sầm uất
vocab.example: I've always wanted to navigate the bustling thoroughfares of Tokyo to experience the city's vibrant energy firsthand.

vocab.meaning: vùng ngoại vi/rìa của cái gì đó
vocab.example: I find walking on the periphery of a historic city often reveals more authentic local life than the tourist center.
While a steep incline can be physically taxing, the sense of accomplishment upon reaching the summit is unparalleled.
A walk through Rome would be like a journey through time, surrounded by the city's magnificent architectural heritage.

vocab.meaning: vùng sông nước tĩnh lặng (vùng xa xôi ít người tới)
vocab.example: I'd relish a long walk through the tranquil backwaters of Kerala to observe the slow pace of rural life.
